See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 88232 => 'Maritime Communications Partner (MCP)', 88233 => 'Oration Technologies', 882342 => 'BebbiCell AG', 882347 => 'BebbiCell AG', 88237 => 'AT&T Cingular Wireless Network', 88249 => 'Monaco Telecom', 88250 => 'Phonegroup', ];
